text.title: Cost Estimation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the cost-estimation methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and a decision-gate that maps to a rule.

step.name: three_point_pert
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each work package must have Optimistic, Most-Likely, Pessimistic estimates; mean = (O + 4M + P) / 6.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `three-point-pert` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: fully_loaded_rate
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Labour cost must use fully-loaded rates (1.3-1.5× base) including benefits, overhead, facilities.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `fully-loaded-rate` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: contingency_from_risks
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Contingency reserve must be computed from risk register (Σ probability × impact), not as a flat 10%.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `contingency-from-risks` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: package_cap_80h
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Work packages estimated >80 hours must be decomposed further; oversized packages hide variance.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `package-cap-80h` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: estimate_justification
step.input: Artefacts listed under `## Prerequisites` in AGENTS.md.
step.action: Each estimate must cite its basis (analogous, parametric, expert judgement) — undocumented numbers rejected.
step.output: Step output feeds the artefact described in `02-output-contract.xml`.
step.decision-gate: If gate fails, STOP and re-apply this step before continuing. Gate condition: Rule `estimate-justification` from 01-core-rules.xml satisfied.

step.name: validate_and_record
step.action: Run `scripts/validate-cost-estimation.py --file artefact.json`. Record output under `## Status` in the artefact.
step.output: Exit 0 = artefact accepted; exit 1 = violations listed; exit 2 = usage error.
step.decision-gate: Validator MUST return 0 before downstream consumption.
